name: Attestto Open
description: Open digital public infrastructure — governed collectively, owned by no one.

governanceModel.rotationPolicy: Requires DAO vote. No single party can rotate keys unilaterally.

principles: Sovereignty — adopters control their own infrastructure
Interoperability — W3C, IETF, ISO standards only
Privacy by design — minimal disclosure, consent-enforced
No vendor lock-in — fork, replace, or self-host at any time
Reversibility — open format export, no trapped data

steward.name: Attestto Open
steward.role: Steward, not owner. Infrastructure governance, not control.
